arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Roy Keane makes 'swagger' claim as Mikel Arteta gives telling reaction to Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Arsenal's Premier League title bid took another huge blow on Sunday as they were held to a disappointing 1-1 draw against a struggling Manchester United side, with the Gunners now 15 points behind their rivals

arts.ttl: Manchester United get injury boost as Amorim gives Leny Yoro update and makes Ayden Heaven prediction
arts.sum: Ten Man United players missed the spirited 1-1 draw with Arsenal through injury while Patrick Dorgu was suspended.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Andrea Berta breakthrough as Mikel Arteta eyes three-step plan
arts.sum: The Gunners had a disastrous January transfer window, so Mikel Arteta will be hoping Andrea Berta can welcome some new faces to the Emirates Stadium in the summer." According to the Evening Standard, Arsenal are closing in on a deal to appoint Andrea Berta as their new sporting director.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim stance speaks volumes as injured Man Utd star joined squad for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim talked up Lisandro Martinez's importance after the injured defender attended Sunday's big match with Arsenal at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man Utd 1-1 Arsenal: Player ratings as Rice salvages draw for Gunners
arts.sum: Mikel Merino came close with an early effort which dragged just wide of Andre Onana's post, while Leandro Trossard thumped a fierce effort wide from the edge of the box after Martin Odegaard forced Onana into a simple save. Having struggled to get near the Arsenal box in the opening period, Raya was forced into an outrageous save to deny Noussair Mazraoui before the Spaniard smothered Joshua Zirkzee's cute close-range flick.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes vow to Man Utd fans after protests against Glazers before Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester United fans staged a huge protest while dressing in black before their clash against Arsenal to vent their fury at the Glazers - and Ruben Amorim's men later put in a spirited display to secure a 1-1 draw

arts.ttl: How Arsenal's next five fixtures compare to Liverpool's after Man Utd draw
arts.sum: Comparing Arsenal & Liverpool's next five Premier League fixtures.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'send scouts' to watch 15-goal Frenchman as Andrea Berta faces transfer dilemma
arts.sum: Arsenal, Chelsea and Liverpool reportedly all had scouts in attendance to watch Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram in Wednesday's Champions League clash with Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Wall distance or keeper error? Why did Arsenal concede from Fernandes free-kick?
arts.sum: Shay Given and Wayne Rooney debate whether the distance of Arsenal's wall from the ball or David Raya's positioning caused them to concede from Bruno Fernandes' free-kick goal in their 1-1 draw with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp sticks up for Ruben Amorim but insists Man United must be patient with their manager if they want him to deliver success
arts.sum: Since the legendary Sir Alex Ferguson retired after winning his 13th Premier League title in 2013, United have had 10 different managers - including interim bosses - in less than 12 years.
